name: webdatabaseproject
description: - User can log in and view a dashboard of tasks they need to complete  - Each task can have built in checklists for sub-tasks to break it down into simpler steps - Marking all subtasks as complete will mark the task as complete - Once task is marked as complete it is removed from the main dashboard but can be viewed from completion history - Each task will have an assigned completion date, and they will be displayed in order of most upcoming - User has the option to create new tasks as well as edit and delete existing tasks
author: Samuel Heinz
